title: T-006 — Implement SET-002 Organization Profile step (RHF form)
prompt:
Implement step 1 form: Organization Profile (name, timezone, locale, currency, logo optional).

PRD §14.3-14.4 SET-002: RHF form with fields:
- Organization name (required, text)
- Timezone (required, select/combobox)
- Locale (required, select from supported languages)
- Currency (required, select from ISO 4217 codes)
- Logo (optional, file upload with preview)

Form submits to POST /api/v1/onboarding/step {step_number: 1, data: {name, timezone, locale, currency, logo_url}}

Acceptance:
- Form validates required fields (name at least 1 char, timezone/locale/currency not empty)
- Logo upload previews before submission
- Form submits cleanly and updates onboarding_state.current_step to 2
- Navigate to step 2 (SET-003) on success

Test: RED test verifies form submission updates org with correct values.

pipeline_inputs.description: Step 1 RHF form: Organization Profile data entry
pipeline_inputs.details: Create OrganizationProfileStep component using React Hook Form + Zod schema. Fields: (1) name: text input, required, minLength 1, maxLength 100. (2) timezone: select dropdown, required, populate from IANA timezone list. (3) locale: select dropdown, required, populate from supported locales (e.g. en-US, pl-PL, de-DE). (4) currency: select dropdown, required, ISO 4217 codes (e.g. USD, EUR, PLN). (5) logo: optional file input with image preview (jpg, png, svg allowed; max 5MB). Form validation shows inline error messages. Submit button calls POST /api/v1/onboarding/step with step_number=1 and collected form data (including logo as URL if uploaded, or null). On success, navigate to step 2 (SET-003). Show loading state during submission. Match wizard styling (colors, spacing, fonts).
out_of_scope: logo file storage/CDN (assume URL returns after upload)
acceptance_criteria: Given step 1 form is rendered, when user enters name='ACME Corp', timezone='America/New_York', locale='en-US', currency='USD', then all fields show values
Given form with name empty, when user tries to submit, then validation error appears for name field
Given form fully filled, when user submits, then POST /api/v1/onboarding/step is called and response returns current_step=2
test_strategy: Write e2e test: test_org_profile_form_submission() fills form and verifies API call + navigation
Write e2e test: test_org_profile_validation() submits empty form and verifies error messages
Verify form data is persisted to DB via GET /api/v1/onboarding/resume after submission
risk_red_lines: Do not allow submission with empty required fields
Do not proceed to step 2 if step 1 data is not saved to onboarding_state
